identity.name: SAPS
identity.target_audience: Corporate HR, Recruiters, Talent Acquisition Leads
identity.aesthetic: High-density information, whitespace for clarity, minimal distraction, trusted corporate colors

headings.usage: Section headers, Modal titles, KPI values

body.usage: Table data, Resume text, Form labels

mono.usage: Parsing scores, ID badges, JSON data views

buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 font-medium

cards.dashboard_stat: bg-white border border-border p-6 flex flex-col gap-2
cards.resume_card: bg-white border border-border hover:border-brand-accent/50 transition-colors group cursor-pointer

tables.container: w-full text-sm text-left border rounded-md overflow-hidden bg-white
tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 font-medium h-10 px-4 border-b

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ring-1 ring-inset

visual_enhancers.glass_header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use for the 'Matching in Progress' indicator or active state of best candidate card
visual_enhancers.empty_state: Use clean SVG icons or ASCII art for empty states (No JDs, No Resumes)
visual_enhancers.loading: Skeleton loaders for table rows; 'Scanning' animation for parsing

general: DO NOT use generic centered layouts for the dashboard.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings and 'Public Sans' for body text. Add these to index.html or import in CSS.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Light mode is default. Dark mode must be carefully calibrated (slate-900 bg, not pure black).
accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text).
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-brand-accent).
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, nav).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup Design System: Update tailwind.config.js with colors, fonts, and border radii. Install necessary fonts.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Build Layout Shell: Create the Sidebar + Header + Main Content wrapper. Use 'Glass Header' style.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement Pages: Start with Dashboard, then JD Management, then Resume Upload/View.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Polish: Add micro-interactions, skeleton loading states, and empty states.
